title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings
authors: Rakesh Roshan, Akash Mishra, Arka Ghosh, Smruti Rekha Swain, Parth Patel, Pankaj Shrivastava
abstract: Abstract Thermally sprayed coatings are extensively used in aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial applications because of their superior wear, corrosion, and high-temperature resistance. However, the reliable evaluation of coating adhesion and cohesive integrity remains a major challenge due to the complex lamellar microstructure, residual stresses, porosity, and heterogeneous failure behaviour inherent to thermal spray processes. Among the available characterization techniques, the scratch test has emerged as a rapid, versatile, and sensitive approach for assessing coating integrity and tribological performance. Despite its widespread use, the interpretation of scratch test results for thermally sprayed coatings is still fragmented, with significant variations in testing methodologies, failure criteria, and critical load determination techniques. This review critically analyses the scratch test specifically for thermally sprayed coatings by systematically correlating scratch response with coating microstructure, process parameters, residual stress, porosity, and failure mechanisms. The work comprehensively discusses the evolution of scratch testing, different scratching methodologies, operational parameters, and advanced critical load evaluation techniques such as optical microscopy, acoustic emission analysis, and multi-axis force measurements. Furthermore, the study consolidates and compares the findings of a wide range of coating systems processed through APS, HVOF, HVAF, D-gun, and related thermal spray techniques. The novelty of this work lies in providing an integrated and application-oriented perspective that bridges the gap between fundamental scratch mechanics and practical coating performance evaluation. Unlike previous studies that focus on isolated coating systems or individual testing approaches, this review establishes a unified understanding of how coating architecture and processing conditions govern scratch-induced damage and failure evolution. In addition, the manuscript identifies current limitations, inconsistencies in interpretation, and the need for standardization in scratch testing methodologies for thermally sprayed coatings. The present work, therefore serves as a comprehensive reference for researchers and industrial practitioners working toward the design, optimization, and reliable performance assessment of advanced thermal spray coatings.
venue: The International Journal of Advanced Manufacturing Technology

infographic.key_insight: Scratch testing is a fast but method-sensitive way to judge adhesion and integrity of thermally sprayed coatings, with results strongly shaped by microstructure, residual stress, and porosity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial coatings, better scratch-test interpretation can improve coating qualification, failure diagnosis, and process optimization.
method: Review and compare scratch-test methodologies for thermally sprayed coatings
Relate scratch response to coating architecture, residual stress, porosity, and failure mode
Summarize critical-load evaluation using microscopy, acoustic emission, and multi-axis force data
infographic.evidence_signal: The paper synthesizes findings across many coating systems and thermal spray routes including APS, HVOF, HVAF, and D-gun to correlate scratch behavior with measured failure evolution.
infographic.watch_item: Scratch-test outcomes are not yet standardized, so critical load values can vary significantly with test setup, criteria, and interpretation.
infographic.paper_title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings

zh-Hans.title: 热喷涂涂层划痕测试的批判性分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 热喷涂涂层因其优异的耐磨、耐腐蚀和耐高温性能，被广泛应用于航空航天、能源、汽车和工业领域。然而，由于热喷涂过程固有的复杂层状微观结构、残余应力、孔隙率以及非均质失效行为，对涂层黏附性和内聚完整性的可靠评估仍然是一个重大挑战。在现有表征技术中，划痕测试已成为一种快速、通用且灵敏的手段，用于评估涂层完整性和摩擦学性能。尽管其应用广泛，热喷涂涂层划痕测试结果的解释仍然较为分散，在测试方法、失效判据和临界载荷确定技术方面存在显著差异。本综述专门针对热喷涂涂层，对划痕测试进行了批判性分析，通过系统关联划痕响应与涂层微观结构、工艺参数、残余应力、孔隙率和失效机制，展开讨论。本文全面讨论了划痕测试的发展演变、不同划痕方法、操作参数，以及先进的临界载荷评估技术，如光学显微镜、声发射分析和多轴力测量。此外，本文还汇总并比较了通过 APS、HVOF、HVAF、D-gun 及相关热喷涂技术制备的多种涂层体系的研究结果。本文的创新之处在于提供了一种集成化、面向应用的视角，弥合了基础划痕力学与实际涂层性能评估之间的鸿沟。不同于以往仅关注单一涂层体系或单一测试方法的研究，本综述建立了一个统一认识：涂层结构和加工条件如何控制划痕诱导损伤及失效演化。此外，本文指出了当前的局限性、解释上的不一致，以及热喷涂涂层划痕测试方法标准化的必要性。因此，本文可作为面向先进热喷涂涂层设计、优化和可靠性能评估的研究人员及工业实践者的综合参考。

infographic.key_insight: 划痕测试是一种快速但对方法敏感的手段，可用于判断热喷涂涂层的黏附性和完整性，其结果强烈受微观结构、残余应力和孔隙率影响。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于航空航天、能源、汽车和工业涂层，更准确地解读划痕测试可改善涂层筛选、失效诊断和工艺优化。
method: 回顾并比较热喷涂涂层的划痕测试方法
将划痕响应与涂层结构、残余应力、孔隙率和失效模式关联起来
总结利用显微镜、声发射和多轴力数据进行临界载荷评估的方法
infographic.evidence_signal: 本文综合了 APS、HVOF、HVAF 和 D-gun 等多种热喷涂路线制备的众多涂层体系研究结果，以关联划痕行为与实测的失效演化。
infographic.watch_item: 划痕测试结果尚未标准化，因此临界载荷值会因测试装置、判据和解释方式的不同而显著变化。

title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images
authors: Ata Jahangir Moshayedi, Amir Sohail Khan, Ming Jun Zhang, Shuxin Yang, David Bassir
abstract: Weld defect detection plays a central role in pipeline inspection because it directly influences structural reliability and operational safety.Conventional manual inspection methods suffer from several limitations, including high labor demands, subjective judgment, and inconsistent results, which restrict their effectiveness in large-scale industrial applications. To overcome these challenges, this study evaluates the use of the lightweight convolutional neural network MobileNetV3, considering both its Small and Large configurations, for automatic multi-class classification of pipeline weld defects.The proposed approach integrates image preprocessing and data augmentation with a lightweight deep learning architecture to extract discriminative visual features from weld images. Experimental validation is carried out using two datasets acquired under practical inspection conditions. The AI5083 dataset contains 4,927 images captured using HDR cameras, while the PWDID dataset includes 78 images collected with a mobile phone camera in uncontrolled environments.The experimental results demonstrate strong classification performance, achieving an accuracy of 99.99% on the AI5083 dataset and improved results on the PWDID dataset. Compared with previously reported methods, the proposed approach yields an accuracy improvement of approximately 3%, indicating its robustness across different acquisition settings. In addition to its high accuracy, MobileNetV3 offers fast inference, low memory consumption, and reduced power requirements. Owing to these characteristics and ias compatibility with deployment frameworks such as TensorFlow Lite, ONNX, and CoreML, MobileNetV3 is well suited for mobile and handheld inspection tools. Based on these findings, the use of MobileNetV3 and other modern lightweight architectures along with denoised function are recommended for practical, on device pipeline weld defect inspection systems.

infographic.key_insight: Lightweight MobileNetV3 can classify pipeline weld defects with very high accuracy, making on-device inspection practical for noisy RGB images.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The work supports faster, lower-power, and more deployable weld quality inspection for pipeline maintenance and field operations.
method: Compared MobileNetV3 Small and Large for multi-class weld defect classification.
Used image preprocessing and data augmentation to improve robustness on noisy RGB inputs.
Validated on two real-world datasets captured with HDR cameras and a mobile phone.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports 99.99% accuracy on the AI5083 dataset and improved performance on the smaller PWDID dataset, with about a 3% gain over prior methods.
infographic.watch_item: The very small PWDID dataset and the strong results suggest careful external validation is needed before broad deployment across new inspection conditions.
infographic.paper_title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images

zh-Hans.title: 用于管道焊接缺陷检测的 MobileNetV3：一种针对含噪 RGB 图像的计算机视觉方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊接缺陷检测在管道检测中起着核心作用，因为它直接影响结构可靠性和运行安全。传统人工检测方法存在若干局限，包括劳动强度高、判断主观性强以及结果不一致，这些问题限制了其在大规模工业应用中的有效性。为克服这些挑战，本研究评估了轻量级卷积神经网络 MobileNetV3 的使用，考虑其 Small 和 Large 两种配置，用于管道焊接缺陷的自动多类别分类。所提出的方法将图像预处理和数据增强与轻量级深度学习架构相结合，以从焊缝图像中提取具有区分性的视觉特征。实验验证基于两个在实际检测条件下采集的数据集进行。AI5083 数据集包含 4,927 张使用 HDR 相机拍摄的图像，而 PWDID 数据集包含 78 张在非受控环境下使用手机相机采集的图像。实验结果表明，该方法具有很强的分类性能，在 AI5083 数据集上达到 99.99% 的准确率，并在 PWDID 数据集上取得了更好的结果。与先前报道的方法相比，所提出的方法约提升了 3% 的准确率，表明其在不同采集条件下具有鲁棒性。除高准确率外，MobileNetV3 还具有快速推理、低内存占用和较低功耗等优点。由于这些特性以及其与 TensorFlow Lite、ONNX 和 CoreML 等部署框架的兼容性，MobileNetV3 非常适合用于移动端和手持式检测工具。基于这些发现，建议在实际的端侧管道焊接缺陷检测系统中使用 MobileNetV3 和其他现代轻量级架构，并结合去噪函数。

infographic.key_insight: 轻量级 MobileNetV3 能以很高的准确率对管道焊接缺陷进行分类，使基于设备端的含噪 RGB 图像检测成为可能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究支持更快速、更低功耗且更易部署的焊接质量检测，用于管道维护和现场作业。
method: 将 MobileNetV3 Small 和 Large 用于多类别焊接缺陷分类进行比较。
采用图像预处理和数据增强来提高对含噪 RGB 输入的鲁棒性。
在使用 HDR 相机和手机拍摄的两个真实世界数据集上进行了验证。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了 AI5083 数据集上 99.99% 的准确率，以及在较小的 PWDID 数据集上更好的性能，较先前方法约提升 3%。
infographic.watch_item: PWDID 数据集非常小，而且结果极为出色，因此在推广到新的检测条件之前，需要进行谨慎的外部验证。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: HVAF spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that still retain martensitic transformation and shape-memory functionality, which is unusual for thermally sprayed NiTi.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This opens a practical route to functional smart coatings on steel components for actuation, repair, and surface protection where conventional ceramic coatings are not ideal.
method: HVAF sprayed NiTi onto mild steel.
Compared four processing-parameter sets.
Characterized chemistry, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation, and thermomechanical response.
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were evaluated by microstructural/phase analysis plus functional tests, and the abstract reports martensitic transformation, thermal actuation in 3-point bending, and shape-memory behavior in nanoindentation and scratch tests.
infographic.watch_item: The as-sprayed coatings were microstructurally inhomogeneous with voids, oxides, dislocations, and internal stress, so post-annealing is needed and tensile strength remains limited.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：显微组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程构件表面沉积各种涂层以提高其在磨损、腐蚀、摩擦和热防护方面的性能，已经是一种标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可能是硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层还具有源于独特功能热机械性质的额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层一直被证明较为困难。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；应用最广泛的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学不均匀的涂层，且这些涂层不会发生马氏体转变；冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体附着力差的问题。在本研究中，我们报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um），其不仅表现出功能性热机械性质，而且同时与基体具有很好的附着性。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢上使用四组不同的工艺参数制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变以及功能性热机械性质进行了评估。尽管涂层包含不均匀显微组织、空洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但其在冷却和/或机械载荷作用下仍发生马氏体转变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要退火后才能表现出功能性热机械性质。尽管其拉伸强度有限，这些涂层在三点弯曲测试中表现出热致驱动效应，并在纳米压痕和划痕测试中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF喷涂可制备厚NiTi涂层，并仍保留马氏体转变和形状记忆功能，这对于热喷涂NiTi而言并不常见。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为钢制构件上的功能性智能涂层提供了一条实用途径，适用于驱动、修复和表面防护，尤其是在传统陶瓷涂层并不理想的场合。
method: 将NiTi通过HVAF喷涂到低碳钢上。
比较了四组工艺参数。
对化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变和热机械响应进行了表征。
infographic.evidence_signal: 通过显微组织/相分析以及功能测试对涂层进行评估，摘要报告了马氏体转变、三点弯曲中的热致驱动，以及纳米压痕和划痕测试中的形状记忆行为。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层在显微组织上存在不均匀性，并含有空洞、氧化物、位错和内应力，因此需要后续退火处理，且其拉伸强度仍然有限。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet combines physics-informed self-supervised learning with few-shot prototypical classification to predict laser welding penetration accurately from very limited labeled data.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables practical, low-label quality control for intelligent laser welding, reducing dependence on costly expert annotation while maintaining near-supervised performance.
method: Physics-informed neural network embeds molten-pool/keyhole priors into contrastive self-supervised learning.
Three image augmentation tasks improve feature robustness and generalization.
Prototypical networks use a small labeled set for final penetration-state classification.
infographic.evidence_signal: Using only 200 labeled images (about 5% of the labeled dataset), the model achieved 96.06% classification accuracy, comparable to fully supervised baselines.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on how well the physics priors and image conditions match the target welding setup, so transfer to different materials or sensor settings may require retraining.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 基于物理信息神经网络的自监督学习激光焊接过程焊深预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全熔透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测熔透状态对于保证焊缝质量至关重要。为此，本文提出 SimPhysNet，一种新颖的算法，仅利用少量标注图像即可在激光焊接熔深预测中实现较高的分类精度。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性；后者由于依赖大量高质量标注数据，在工业应用中受到制约。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），模型被引导从大量未标注数据中提取熔池和小孔的物理意义特征，同时三种图像增强任务进一步提升其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的少样本学习策略通过从极少量标注图像中构建类别表示，实现稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占标注数据集总量的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，这与利用全部标注数据集的传统监督学习算法性能相当。本文提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能化自动化提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 将基于物理信息的自监督学习与少样本原型分类相结合，能够仅从极少量标注数据中准确预测激光焊接熔深。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得智能激光焊接中的实用型、低标注成本质量控制成为可能，在减少对昂贵专家标注依赖的同时保持接近监督学习的性能。
method: 物理信息神经网络将熔池/小孔先验嵌入对比式自监督学习。
三种图像增强任务提高特征鲁棒性和泛化能力。
原型网络利用少量标注集进行最终熔深状态分类。
infographic.evidence_signal: 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占标注数据集的 5%），模型达到了 96.06% 的分类准确率，与完全监督基线相当。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于物理先验和图像条件与目标焊接设置的匹配程度，因此迁移到不同材料或传感器设置时可能需要重新训练。

title: Tandem and twin submerged-arc welding of high-strength, low-alloyed structural steels for tubular applications
authors: Ana Carla Santos da Silva, Johnnatan Rodríguez, Renato Alexandre Costa de Santana, Edwar Andrés Torres López, Tiago Felipe de Abreu Santos
abstract: Abstract Multi-wire submerged arc welding (SAW) techniques offer potential advantages for welding structural steels, but their effects on weld geometry, heat input, microstructure, and local hardness must be carefully evaluated. This study investigates the applicability of advanced submerged arc welding (SAW) techniques employing multiple wires configurations, namely tandem arc and twin arc with cold wire addition. The twin-ICE (Integrated Cold Electrode) technique, involving cold wire feeding, has recently gained attention for its potential to reduce the effective heat input and enhance the mechanical properties and structural integrity of welded joints. Nine specimens were fabricated: three using the tandem arc process and six using the twin-ICE configuration, varying the cold wire feeding ratio. The joints were evaluated through optical and scanning electron microscopy, stereoscopy, and microhardness mapping. Preliminary results indicate that cold wire addition may reduce the effective heat input, leading to a narrower HAZ, grain refinement, and a greater qualitative presence of acicular ferrite, consistent with the observed hardness response. While penetration depth may decrease with high cold wire ratios, optimized configurations achieve complete joint penetration (CJP) and improved bead geometry. The findings suggest that both SAW tandem and SAW twin-ICE processes are viable for welding HSLA steel plates up to 16 mm thick within industrially acceptable speed and energy ranges.
venue: The International Journal of Advanced Manufacturing Technology

infographic.key_insight: Tandem SAW and twin-ICE cold-wire SAW can weld HSLA tubular steels while lowering effective heat input and refining the weld/HAZ structure, especially when cold-wire ratio is optimized.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study points to process settings that can improve bead geometry, hardness response, and joint integrity for thicker HSLA steel plates in industrial tubular fabrication.
method: Fabricated 9 welded specimens
Compared tandem arc SAW with twin-ICE SAW at different cold-wire feeding ratios
Used optical/SEM microscopy, stereoscopy, and microhardness mapping
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports narrower HAZ, grain refinement, more acicular ferrite, and hardness changes consistent with reduced effective heat input, with complete joint penetration achieved in optimized cases.
infographic.watch_item: Excessive cold-wire addition can reduce penetration depth, so process windows must be tuned to avoid incomplete fusion or loss of CJP.
infographic.paper_title: Tandem and twin submerged-arc welding of high-strength, low-alloyed structural steels for tubular applications

zh-Hans.title: 用于管状应用的高强度低合金结构钢的串列与双丝埋弧焊
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 多丝埋弧焊（SAW）技术在焊接结构钢方面具有潜在优势，但其对焊缝几何形状、热输入、显微组织和局部硬度的影响必须经过仔细评估。本研究考察了采用多丝配置的先进埋弧焊（SAW）技术的适用性，即串列电弧和带冷丝加入的双电弧。双ICE（集成冷电极，Integrated Cold Electrode）技术涉及冷丝送进，近年来因其有望降低有效热输入并改善焊接接头的力学性能和结构完整性而受到关注。共制备了9个试样：3个采用串列电弧工艺，6个采用双ICE配置，并改变冷丝送进比。通过金相显微镜和扫描电子显微镜、立体显微观察以及显微硬度映射对接头进行了评估。初步结果表明，加入冷丝可能降低有效热输入，从而导致热影响区（HAZ）更窄、晶粒细化，并使针状铁素体的定性含量更高，这与观察到的硬度响应一致。虽然在较高冷丝比下熔深可能降低，但经过优化的配置能够实现完全焊透（CJP）并改善焊道几何形状。研究结果表明，SAW串列和SAW双ICE工艺均适用于焊接厚度最高达16 mm的HSLA钢板，且可在工业可接受的速度和能量范围内实施。

infographic.key_insight: 串列SAW和双ICE冷丝SAW可在降低有效热输入并细化焊缝/热影响区组织的同时焊接HSLA管状钢，尤其是在优化冷丝比时。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究指出了一些工艺参数设置，可改善较厚HSLA钢板在工业管材制造中的焊道几何形状、硬度响应和接头完整性。
method: 制备了9个焊接试样
在不同冷丝送进比下比较了串列电弧SAW与双ICE SAW
采用光学/扫描电子显微镜、立体显微观察和显微硬度映射进行分析
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了更窄的热影响区、晶粒细化、更多针状铁素体，以及与降低有效热输入一致的硬度变化；在优化情况下实现了完全焊透。
infographic.watch_item: 过量冷丝加入会降低熔深，因此必须调节工艺窗口，以避免未熔合或失去完全焊透（CJP）。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A transfer-learning and loss-function upgrade to BiSeNetV2 substantially improves reflective weld seam segmentation without making the model heavier.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical real-time perception boost for autonomous welding robots operating on shiny metal surfaces, where seam detection is often unstable.
method: Start with a BiSeNetV2 lightweight segmentation backbone.
Apply transfer learning to stabilize learning on challenging reflective seam data.
Use a hybrid Cross-Entropy + Lovász loss to improve boundary and IoU performance.
infographic.evidence_signal: The method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline while keeping FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed unchanged.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains may depend on reflective construction-welding conditions and should be validated across more seam types, sensors, and deployment environments.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强建筑自动焊接机器人的焊缝分割：解决双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 可靠的焊缝分割对于建筑场景中的自主机器人焊接至关重要，因为恶劣照明、镜面反射以及细窄的焊缝几何形态常常会降低分割性能。本研究提出了一种抗反射焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失增强 BiSeNetV2 主干网络。该框架并非通过增加网络架构复杂度，而是通过面向学习稳定性的优化来提高抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提方法达到 81.76\% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73\% 的 mIoU，在保持相同 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度的同时，相比基于 OHEM 的基线，Joint IoU 提升了 +22.36 个百分点。所提方法还在反射条件下恢复了 96.33\% 的严重零 IoU 失败案例。对 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，所提出的优化策略对于轻量级实时分割架构尤为有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均有所改善。这些发现表明，所提框架为涉及反光金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量化的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 对 BiSeNetV2 进行迁移学习和损失函数升级，可在不增加模型负担的情况下显著提升反射环境下的焊缝分割性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为在光亮金属表面作业的自主焊接机器人提供了一种实用的实时感知增强方案，因为这类场景中的焊缝检测往往不稳定。
method: 以 BiSeNetV2 轻量级分割主干网络为起点。
应用迁移学习，以稳定在具有挑战性的反射焊缝数据上的学习过程。
采用混合 Cross-Entropy + Lovász 损失，以提升边界和 IoU 性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法达到 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，在保持 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度不变的情况下，相比 OHEM 基线将 Joint IoU 提高了 22.36 个百分点。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升可能依赖于反射性建筑焊接条件，仍需在更多焊缝类型、传感器和部署环境中进行验证。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network can simultaneously predict laser welding penetration state, penetration depth, and weld seam morphology from weld-pool images and process parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables in-situ quality control for laser penetration welding by turning real-time camera data into actionable weld-quality predictions.
method: Uses CMOS camera top-view weld pool images as the primary sensing input.
Combines convolutional neural networks with state space models to extract spatial-temporal features.
Trains a multi-task framework that jointly predicts penetration state, depth, and cross-section morphology.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm depth prediction error, and 95.65% cross-section reconstruction accuracy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of the constructed dataset, so robustness under different materials, optics, and welding conditions still needs careful validation.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于预测激光焊接熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，对熔深状态和焊缝形貌的评估在判定焊接质量方面起着至关重要的作用。本文对一种创新的多任务深度学习模型进行了全面介绍，该模型能够高精度预测熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。该监测平台依赖于激光焊接过程中使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征与焊接参数相结合，构建了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，熔深状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝横截面重建准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光穿透焊接系统中的原位质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空深度神经网络可以利用熔池图像和工艺参数，同时预测激光焊接的熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得通过将实时相机数据转化为可操作的焊接质量预测结果，能够实现激光穿透焊接的原位质量控制。
method: 使用CMOS相机采集的俯视熔池图像作为主要传感输入。
结合卷积神经网络和状态空间模型提取时空特征。
训练一个多任务框架，联合预测熔深状态、熔深和横截面形貌。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，该模型实现了99.35%的熔深状态准确率、1.79毫米的熔深预测误差以及95.65%的横截面重建准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于所构建数据集的质量和代表性，因此在不同材料、光学条件和焊接条件下的鲁棒性仍需谨慎验证。

infographic.engineering_relevance: The study supports process design for faster, more reliable aluminum welding by helping predict defect formation and tune parameters before shop-floor trials.

zh-Hans.title: 6061-T6铝合金高速搅拌摩擦焊的多场CEL仿真与优化
zh-Hans.abstract: 由OpenAlex收录于《Journal of Mechanical Science and Technology》的期刊论文。

infographic.key_insight: 采用耦合多场CEL仿真，通过捕捉连接过程中复杂的材料流动和热-机械行为，对6061-T6铝合金高速搅拌摩擦焊进行了优化。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究通过帮助在车间试验前预测缺陷形成并调节参数，为更快、更可靠的铝焊接工艺设计提供支持。
method: 建立了用于6061-T6铝高速FSW的多场耦合CEL模型。
采用基于仿真的优化方法评估焊接条件和工艺响应。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation framework with gradual source domain expansion can transfer weld penetration classification across fundamentally different welding processes with strong accuracy gains.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This reduces the need for costly relabeling when deploying intelligent weld monitoring from one process, such as TIG, to another, such as laser welding.
method: UDA for cross-process penetration status prediction
Gradual source domain expansion to broaden source knowledge
UMAP-based feature alignment check for domain invariance
infographic.evidence_signal: The method achieved 90.65% and 90.72% average accuracy in same-process tasks, and 80.48% TIG-to-laser plus 81.13% laser-to-TIG in cross-process transfer, with large improvements over the supervised baseline.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may still depend on how similar the target welding conditions are to the source data, so robustness across unseen materials, settings, or sensor setups should be validated before deployment.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 基于激光和TIG焊接中无监督领域自适应的跨工艺焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机理的焊接工艺之间迁移时，例如从以电弧为主的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊迁移到基于小孔效应的激光焊时，其性能往往会因领域偏移而显著下降。为克服这一局限，我们提出一种结合渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督领域自适应（UDA）框架。基于专门构建的TIG和激光焊数据集进行评估后，我们的方法在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高准确率。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，它在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，较监督基线分别提升35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨工艺场景中，TIG到Laser和Laser到TIG的准确率分别达到80.48%和81.13%，较基线分别提升43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化结果验证了该模型在保持可分辨类别边界的同时学习到了领域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重标注成本，并提升了不同焊接系统中智能监测的通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督领域自适应框架能够在本质上不同的焊接工艺之间迁移焊缝熔深分类，并取得显著的准确率提升。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这减少了将智能焊缝监测从一种工艺（如TIG）部署到另一种工艺（如激光焊）时对高成本重标注的需求。
method: 用于跨工艺熔深状态预测的UDA
通过渐进式源域扩展拓宽源域知识
基于UMAP的特征对齐检查以验证领域不变性
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法在同工艺任务中的平均准确率达到90.65%和90.72%，在跨工艺迁移中TIG到激光为80.48%、激光到TIG为81.13%，且较监督基线有大幅提升。
infographic.watch_item: 性能仍可能取决于目标焊接条件与源数据的相似程度，因此在部署前应验证其对未见材料、参数设置或传感器配置的鲁棒性。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: A D-gun applied Al2O3-TiO2 coating substantially improves the wear resistance of Ti-6Al-4V, and random forest predicts wear most accurately from sliding conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study links detonation spray coating process parameters with tribological performance, offering a practical route to extend the service life of aerospace, biomedical, and marine Ti-6Al-4V components.
method: Applied ~200 µm Al2O3-TiO2 ceramic coating on Ti-6Al-4V using detonation gun spraying.
Measured wear via ASTM G99 pin-on-disc tests against EN31 steel at 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min.
Built ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from test conditions.
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM showed reduced wear and a protective tribo-layer on coated surfaces; random forest gave the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error.
infographic.watch_item: The results are based on a limited experimental window and specific coating/process settings, so the model and coating performance may not generalize without further validation.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun涂层Ti-6Al-4V合金的摩擦学增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，研究了Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层和未涂层Ti-6Al-4V合金的摩擦学行为。在受控条件下（氧气流量：4800 SLPH、乙炔：2150 SLPH、喷涂距离：180 mm、颗粒速度约1200 m/s），采用爆震枪（D-gun）工艺在Ti-6Al-4V合金上制备了约200 µm厚的Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层。依据ASTM G99标准，使用销盘式试验装置测试样品的磨损行为。试验在EN31钢对偶表面上进行，法向载荷为40–100 N、滑动速度为100–200 rpm、持续时间为20–40 min。扫描电子显微镜表明，涂层表面的磨损减轻，并形成了保护性摩擦层。建立了人工神经网络、K近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，根据滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林凭借更低的平均百分比误差和均方误差被证明是最佳选择。结果表明，D-gun沉积的Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层改善了Ti-6Al-4V的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: D-gun施加的Al2O3-TiO2涂层显著提高了Ti-6Al-4V的耐磨性，而随机森林可根据滑动条件最准确地预测磨损。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究将爆震喷涂涂层工艺参数与摩擦学性能联系起来，为延长航空航天、生物医学和海洋Ti-6Al-4V部件的服役寿命提供了一条实用途径。
method: 采用爆震枪喷涂在Ti-6Al-4V上制备约200 µm厚的Al2O3-TiO2陶瓷涂层。
依据ASTM G99销盘试验，在40–100 N、100–200 rpm和20–40 min条件下对EN31钢进行磨损测量。
构建ANN、KNN和随机森林模型，根据试验条件预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: SEM显示涂层表面的磨损减轻并形成保护性摩擦层；随机森林具有最低的平均百分比误差和均方误差。
infographic.watch_item: 结果基于有限的实验窗口和特定的涂层/工艺设定，因此模型和涂层性能在未经进一步验证前可能无法推广。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Changhao Yin, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

infographic.key_insight: The paper predicts future weld-pool regions 500 ms ahead by combining physics-guided state-space temporal modeling with process and sensor signals for real-time laser wire-feed welding segmentation.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables more reliable closed-loop welding control by compensating for sensing and actuation delay with lookahead perception of keyhole, wire, and molten-pool geometry.
method: Uses historical coaxial grayscale images plus welding parameters and aligned wire-state electrical signals as inputs.
Applies a spatiotemporal state-space network with process/sensor-conditioned normalization and patch-level temporal modeling.
Adds dense future feature prediction, motion-aware decoding, and auxiliary geometry/consistency losses to stabilize future masks.
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 43-sequence laser welding dataset, WeldMamba achieved 74.63% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead, with ablations showing temporal history, patch-level state-space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness as key contributors.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on synchronized multimodal sensing and may be sensitive to domain shift or timing misalignment in real welding setups.
infographic.paper_title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于激光填丝焊接前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间建模
zh-Hans.abstract: 实时焊池感知对于激光填丝焊接中的闭环控制至关重要，因为传感、计算和执行器响应会引入不可避免的延迟。本文提出一种物理引导的时空状态空间网络，用于前瞻焊池分割。该模型利用历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数以及对齐的送丝状态电信号，预测三个具有物理意义的区域在未来的语义布局：小孔、焊丝和熔池。该方法结合了视觉编码器、工艺和传感器条件化特征归一化、基于图像块级的时间状态空间建模、基于预测视界条件的潜变量预测、稠密未来特征预测以及运动感知掩码解码器。辅助的有符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏和细粒度小孔损失进一步约束了预测几何形状和局部运动。在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上的实验表明，所提出的WeldMamba在500 ms前瞻条件下达到74.63\% mIoU。消融研究进一步表明，时间历史、基于图像块的状态空间建模以及小孔运动感知是实现稳健未来分割的主要贡献因素。

infographic.key_insight: 本文通过将物理引导的状态空间时序建模与工艺和传感信号相结合，实现了对激光填丝焊接中未来焊池区域500 ms前瞻预测，用于实时分割。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得通过前瞻感知小孔、焊丝和熔池几何形状来补偿传感与执行延迟，从而实现更可靠的闭环焊接控制。
method: 使用历史同轴灰度图像以及焊接参数和对齐的送丝状态电信号作为输入。
采用具有工艺/传感器条件化归一化和图像块级时间建模的时空状态空间网络。
加入稠密未来特征预测、运动感知解码以及辅助几何/一致性损失，以稳定未来掩码。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，WeldMamba在500 ms前瞻条件下实现了74.63% mIoU，消融结果表明时间历史、基于图像块的状态空间建模和小孔运动感知是关键贡献因素。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于同步的多模态传感，在实际焊接场景中可能对域偏移或时间对齐误差较为敏感。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Increasing the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% made detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings denser and more wear-resistant, though with a slightly higher friction coefficient.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This suggests barrel filling ratio is a practical process knob for tuning protective carbide coatings used in high-wear and high-temperature components.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings at 43% and 53% barrel filling ratios under identical conditions
Compared microstructure and phase composition using microscopy and XRD
Evaluated dry sliding wear with ball-on-disc tests at 10 and 15 N, 5 and 10 cm/s
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% coating showed lower porosity, retained Cr3C2/NiCr as dominant phases with minor Cr7C3 formation, and achieved a minimum wear rate of 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N).
infographic.watch_item: The improvement comes with higher friction, and the results are based on a limited set of loads and sliding speeds, so broader operating validation is still needed.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 桶填充率对爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层显微组织、相组成及摩擦学性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了桶填充率对爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层显微组织、相组成及摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别在43%和53%的桶填充率下制备涂层。显微组织表征表明，涂层形成了致密的层状结构，孔隙率较低，Cr3C2碳化物颗粒在NiCr金属基体中分布均匀。与43%桶填充率下沉积的涂层相比，53%桶填充率下沉积的涂层显微组织更致密。X射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后Cr3C2和NiCr仍为主导相，而由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，形成了少量Cr7C3。采用球-盘配置在干滑动条件下对摩擦学性能进行评估，法向载荷为10和15 N，滑动速度为5和10 cm/s。磨损体积根据试验后磨痕的几何形貌确定，并据此计算磨损率。53%桶填充率制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更好的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数更高。最小磨损率达到1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与涂层孔隙率降低和结构完整性增强有关。结果表明，爆炸喷涂参数的优化会显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所制备的Cr3C2–NiCr涂层有望作为在严苛摩擦磨损条件下运行的部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将桶填充率从43%提高到53%可使爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层更致密、耐磨性更好，但摩擦系数略有升高。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明桶填充率是调控用于高磨损和高温部件的防护碳化物涂层的一项实用工艺参数。
method: 在相同条件下，于43%和53%桶填充率下爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层
采用显微镜和XRD比较显微组织与相组成
采用球-盘试验在10和15 N、5和10 cm/s条件下评估干滑动磨损
infographic.evidence_signal: 53%涂层孔隙率更低，保留了以Cr3C2/NiCr为主导相并伴有少量Cr7C3形成，且最小磨损率达到1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升伴随着更高的摩擦系数，而且结果基于有限的载荷和滑动速度组合，因此仍需在更广泛的工况下验证。

title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits
authors: Steven Camilleri, Thi Thuy Tien Tran, Keita Nomoto, Andrew Duguid, Matthew Harbidge, Riyan Rashid
abstract: Cold spray additive manufacturing (CSAM) is a solid-state process capable of producing dense metallic components without melting, making it highly attractive for copper applications requiring both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity. In this study, the influence of spray pressure at 30 bar, 40 bar, 50 bar and 60 bar on particle velocity, microstructure, and properties of cold-sprayed copper was systematically investigated using a LightSPEE3D system. The cold spray deposits were characterised by X-ray diffraction (XRD), hardness testing, eddy current conductivity, tensile evaluation, and scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results reveal that increasing spray pressure enhances particle velocities beyond the critical threshold for copper, leading to improved inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement consistent with severe plastic deformation and possible continuous dynamic recrystallisation (cDRX)-assisted mechanisms. XRD analysis suggested progressive crystallite refinement and increased dislocation density with pressure, which directly correlated with improved ductility. While hardness decreased due to recovery and recrystallisation, electrical conductivity increased, likely due to improved inter-particle continuity and reduced interfacial discontinuities. Tensile testing showed a clear strength-ductility transition, with deposits at higher pressures exhibiting substantially improved ductility approaching bulk copper behaviour and fully ductile fracture morphologies. Overall, the findings identify an optimum processing window at higher spray pressures, where copper cold spray deposits achieve a balanced combination of conductivity, ductility, and strength. This study highlights the critical role of spray pressure in controlling the interplay between particle velocity, dynamic recrystallisation, and multifunctional performance in CSAM copper components. This study establishes a process-structure-property relationship linking particle velocity, XRD-derived microstructural evolution, conductivity, and tensile behaviour within a LightSPEE3D CSAM system.

infographic.key_insight: Higher cold-spray pressure increases copper particle velocity beyond the bonding threshold, producing denser, more ductile deposits with better conductivity through stronger inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For CSAM copper parts, spray pressure is a key process lever to balance conductivity, ductility, and strength without melting the material.
method: Cold-sprayed copper at 30, 40, 50, and 60 bar using a LightSPEE3D system
Characterised deposits with XRD, SEM, hardness, eddy-current conductivity, and tensile testing
Compared pressure-driven changes in particle velocity, microstructure, and mechanical/electrical performance
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports higher-pressure deposits showed crystallite refinement, increased conductivity, lower hardness, and a clear shift toward ductile tensile behaviour with fully ductile fracture at the highest pressures.
infographic.watch_item: The optimum window appears pressure-dependent for this specific LightSPEE3D setup, so the same settings may not transfer directly to other nozzles, feedstocks, or stand-off conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits

zh-Hans.title: 冷喷涂增材制造优化：压力驱动提升铜沉积层力学性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 冷喷涂增材制造（CSAM）是一种固态工艺，能够在不熔化材料的情况下制备致密金属构件，因此对于既要求电导率又要求机械完整性的铜应用具有很强的吸引力。本研究采用 LightSPEE3D 系统，系统考察了喷涂压力在 30 bar、40 bar、50 bar 和 60 bar 条件下对冷喷涂铜颗粒速度、显微组织和性能的影响。通过 X 射线衍射（XRD）、硬度测试、涡流电导率测试、拉伸评价和扫描电子显微镜（SEM）对冷喷涂沉积层进行了表征。结果表明，提高喷涂压力可使颗粒速度超过铜的临界阈值，从而增强颗粒间结合，并获得与严重塑性变形以及可能由连续动态再结晶（cDRX）辅助的机制一致的显微组织细化。XRD 分析表明，随着压力升高，晶粒尺寸逐步细化、位错密度增加，这与延展性的提升直接相关。尽管由于回复和再结晶导致硬度下降，但电导率提高，这可能是由于颗粒间连续性改善以及界面不连续性减少所致。拉伸测试显示出清晰的强-韧转变，高压力下的沉积层表现出显著改善的延展性，接近块体铜的行为，并呈现完全延性断裂形貌。总体而言，研究结果确定了更高喷涂压力下的最佳工艺窗口，在该窗口内，铜冷喷涂沉积层可实现导电性、延展性和强度的平衡组合。本研究强调了喷涂压力在控制颗粒速度、动态再结晶以及 CSAM 铜构件多功能性能之间相互作用中的关键作用。本研究建立了 LightSPEE3D CSAM 系统中颗粒速度、基于 XRD 的显微组织演变、电导率与拉伸行为之间的工艺-组织-性能关系。

infographic.key_insight: 更高的冷喷涂压力会使铜颗粒速度超过结合阈值，通过更强的颗粒间结合和显微组织细化，形成更致密、延展性更好且导电性更优的沉积层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于 CSAM 铜部件，喷涂压力是平衡导电性、延展性和强度的关键工艺调控参数，且无需熔化材料。
method: 使用 LightSPEE3D 系统在 30、40、50 和 60 bar 条件下冷喷涂铜
采用 XRD、SEM、硬度、涡流电导率和拉伸测试对沉积层进行表征
比较压力驱动下颗粒速度、显微组织以及力学/电学性能的变化
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告表明，更高压力下的沉积层出现晶粒细化、电导率提高、硬度降低，并在最高压力下向延性拉伸行为明显转变，且断口呈完全延性断裂。
infographic.watch_item: 最佳窗口似乎取决于该特定 LightSPEE3D 配置的压力条件，因此相同参数未必能直接迁移到其他喷嘴、原料或喷距条件。

title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS
authors: Dastan Buitkenov, Nurkhat Bimakhan, Nurmakhanbet Raisov
abstract: In this work, self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings based on the NiCrFeBSiC system were obtained by air plasma spraying, and their structural, mechanical, and tribological properties were investigated.. The effect of argon flow rate (1600 and 1800 L/h) during coating formation was consideredIt was found that an increase in argon flow rate leads to an approximately twofold increase in coating thickness and a twofold decrease in porosity. According to the microhardness measurement results, the microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, while the elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa. Tribological tests were carried out using the ball-on-disk configurationAt an argon flow rate of 1800 L/h, the friction coefficient showed a lower value (≈0.107), indicating improved wear resistance of the coatings. Scratch test results showed a high level of adhesion between the coatings and the substrate. Although the critical load values (Lc) were similar for both regimes, the coatings obtained at 1800 L/h exhibited a more gradual and stable failure behavior.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Raising argon flow from 1600 to 1800 L/h during air plasma spraying produced denser NiCrFeBSiC coatings with thicker deposits, lower porosity, and better wear behavior.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Process gas tuning is a practical lever for improving thermal-sprayed self-fluxing coatings on the same substrate without changing alloy chemistry.
method: Air plasma sprayed NiCrFeBSiC self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings at two argon flow rates: 1600 and 1800 L/h.
Compared coating structure and properties using thickness/porosity analysis, microhardness and elastic modulus measurements, tribology tests, and scratch adhesion testing.
Evaluated wear performance with ball-on-disk friction testing and interfacial strength with critical load measurements.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports about a twofold increase in coating thickness, a twofold decrease in porosity, microhardness of 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, elastic modulus of 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa, and a lower friction coefficient near 0.107 at 1800 L/h.
infographic.watch_item: The study compares only two argon flow settings, so broader operating windows and long-term durability still need validation before process transfer.
infographic.paper_title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS

zh-Hans.title: 空气等离子喷涂过程中氩气流量对 NiCrFeBSiC 涂层结构和性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本工作采用空气等离子喷涂制备了基于 NiCrFeBSiC 体系的自熔性金属陶瓷涂层，并研究了其结构、力学和摩擦学性能。考察了涂层形成过程中氩气流量（1600 和 1800 L/h）的影响。结果表明，随着氩气流量增加，涂层厚度约增加一倍，而孔隙率降低一半。根据显微硬度测量结果，显微硬度为 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，弹性模量为 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。采用球-盘配置进行了摩擦学测试。在 1800 L/h 的氩气流量下，摩擦系数较低（≈0.107），表明涂层的耐磨性有所提高。划痕试验结果表明涂层与基体之间具有较高的结合强度。尽管两种工况下的临界载荷值（Lc）相近，但在 1800 L/h 下获得的涂层表现出更为渐进且稳定的失效行为。

infographic.key_insight: 将空气等离子喷涂过程中的氩气流量从 1600 提高到 1800 L/h，可制备出更致密的 NiCrFeBSiC 涂层，其沉积层更厚、孔隙率更低，且耐磨行为更好。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 工艺气体调控是改进在相同基体上热喷涂自熔性涂层的一种实用手段，无需改变合金化学成分。
method: 在两种氩气流量条件下（1600 和 1800 L/h）对 NiCrFeBSiC 自熔性金属陶瓷涂层进行空气等离子喷涂。
通过厚度/孔隙率分析、显微硬度和弹性模量测量、摩擦学测试以及划痕附着力测试比较涂层结构和性能。
采用球-盘摩擦测试评估耐磨性能，并通过临界载荷测量评估界面强度。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告涂层厚度约增加一倍、孔隙率约降低一半、显微硬度为 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV、弹性模量为 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa，并且在 1800 L/h 时摩擦系数较低，约为 0.107。
infographic.watch_item: 该研究仅比较了两种氩气流量设定，因此在工艺转移前，仍需验证更宽的操作窗口和长期耐久性。

title: Investigation of Detonation-Sprayed NiCr–Al Coatings Tested under Real Operating Conditions of a Thermal Power Plant
authors: М. Маулет, Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, N.N. Yusof, A.К. Khassenov
abstract: This study presents the experimental results of high-temperature oxidation testing under actual operating con ditions in a thermal power plant of gradient and homogeneous composite NiCr–Al coatings produced by the detonation spraying method. To characterize the degradation mechanisms of the tested coatings, systematic analyses were performed, including phase composition evaluation, and detailed microstructural examination using scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The evolution of oxide layers and elemental redistribution across the coating thickness were also assessed to clarify the influence of coating architecture on protective perfor mance. The experimental results demonstrated that the gradient composite NiCr–Al coatings exhibit superior resistance to high-temperature oxidation compared to homogeneous coatings. The gradient architecture effec tively preserved structural integrity and promoted a more uniform distribution of aluminum and chromium within the coating thickness. This compositional optimization facilitated the formation of continuous and ad herent protective oxide layers, predominantly Al2O3 and Cr2O3, which significantly reduced oxidation kinet ics and inhibited coating degradation. In contrast, the homogeneous NiCr–Al coatings showed noticeable aluminum depletion, crack formation, and oxide scale spallation after prolonged exposure to high temperature industrial conditions. The findings of this study confirm that gradient NiCr–Al coatings deposit ed by detonation spraying represent a promising protective solution for components operating in severe high temperature and corrosive environments, offering improved durability and extended service life for industrial and energy related applications.
venue: Bulletin of the Karaganda University Physics Series

infographic.key_insight: Gradient detonation-sprayed NiCr–Al coatings outperform homogeneous coatings by maintaining a more protective oxide layer and slowing high-temperature oxidation.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For thermal power plant components, coating architecture matters: compositional grading can improve durability, reduce spallation, and extend service life in severe hot, corrosive environments.
method: Detonation-sprayed gradient and homogeneous NiCr–Al composite coatings
Real operating-condition high-temperature oxidation testing in a thermal power plant
SEM, phase analysis, and cross-sectional elemental redistribution/oxide-scale assessment
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that gradient coatings preserved structure better, showed more uniform Al/Cr distribution, and formed more continuous Al2O3/Cr2O3 scales than homogeneous coatings under prolonged exposure.
infographic.watch_item: Results are based on one coating system and service environment, so transferability to other substrates, temperatures, and duty cycles should be validated before deployment.
infographic.paper_title: Investigation of Detonation-Sprayed NiCr–Al Coatings Tested under Real Operating Conditions of a Thermal Power Plant

zh-Hans.title: 在热电厂真实运行条件下测试的爆炸喷涂 NiCr–Al 涂层研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究给出了在热电厂实际运行条件下，对采用爆炸喷涂方法制备的梯度和均匀复合 NiCr–Al 涂层进行高温氧化测试的实验结果。为表征所测试涂层的劣化机制，开展了系统分析，包括相组成评价以及采用扫描电子显微镜（SEM）进行的详细微观结构检查。还评估了氧化层的演化和元素在涂层厚度方向上的重新分布，以阐明涂层结构对防护性能的影响。实验结果表明，与均匀涂层相比，梯度复合 NiCr–Al 涂层具有更优异的高温氧化抗力。梯度结构有效保持了结构完整性，并促进了铝和铬在涂层厚度方向上更均匀的分布。这种成分优化有利于形成连续且附着良好的保护性氧化层，主要为 Al2O3 和 Cr2O3，从而显著降低氧化动力学并抑制涂层劣化。相比之下，均匀 NiCr–Al 涂层在长时间暴露于高温工业条件后出现了明显的铝耗减、裂纹形成和氧化膜剥落。本研究结果证实，采用爆炸喷涂制备的梯度 NiCr–Al 涂层是一种很有前景的防护方案，适用于在严苛高温和腐蚀环境中运行的部件，可为工业和能源相关应用提供更高的耐久性和更长的使用寿命。

infographic.key_insight: 梯度爆炸喷涂 NiCr–Al 涂层通过保持更具防护性的氧化层并减缓高温氧化，优于均匀涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于热电厂部件而言，涂层结构至关重要：成分梯度化可提高耐久性、减少剥落，并在严苛的高温腐蚀环境中延长使用寿命。
method: 爆炸喷涂制备梯度和均匀 NiCr–Al 复合涂层
在热电厂真实运行条件下进行高温氧化测试
SEM、相分析以及截面元素重新分布/氧化膜评估
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要表明，在长时间暴露下，梯度涂层比均匀涂层更好地保持了结构，Al/Cr 分布更均匀，并形成了更连续的 Al2O3/Cr2O3 氧化膜。
infographic.watch_item: 结果基于一种涂层体系和一种服役环境，因此在部署前应针对其他基体、温度和工况循环验证其可迁移性。

title: STUDY ON THE CORROSION BEHAVIOUR OF PLASMA SPRAYED NANO Al2O3–TiO2– AISI 1020 STEEL COATINGS USING DEFINITIVE SCREENING DESIGN
abstract: In the present study the electrochemical corrosion properties of plasma-sprayed nano Al2O3–TiO2 coating on AISI 1020 mild steel is assessed. The effects of Al2O3 content (2, 3 and 4 wt.%), NaCl concentration, exposure time, temperature and pH were studied with a Definitive Screening Design (DSD) with a fixed amount of TiO2 (2 wt.%). Potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) were used on a Corrtest CS350M workstation to assess the corrosion behaviour. The corrosion resistance of the coating with Al2O3 (4 wt. %) + TiO2 (2 wt. %) was the highest with the lowest corrosion current density (2.18 µA cm−2) and corrosion potential (−0.489 V (vs. SCE)), which was significantly lower when compared with the uncoated sample. The results of statistical analysis showed that the influence of NaCl concentration on corrosion rate was about 78% and 72% of the variation in NaCl concentration on corrosion current density. The effects of the coating parameters were compared, and the content of Al2O3 was most influential, with approximately 15% and 21% of the variations in the responses accounted for by this parameter. The minimum corrosion rate was determined to be 0.010 mm yr−1 and the developed models proved to have good predictive power, with R² values exceeding 0.99.
venue: International Journal of Drug Delivery Technology

infographic.key_insight: A plasma-sprayed nano Al2O3–TiO2 coating on AISI 1020 steel improved corrosion resistance, with the 4 wt.% Al2O3 + 2 wt.% TiO2 coating performing best.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing ceramic coating composition and exposure conditions can substantially reduce corrosion in mild-steel components used in aggressive saline environments.
method: Definitive Screening Design (DSD) varied Al2O3 content, NaCl concentration, exposure time, temperature, and pH.
Potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) measured corrosion behavior.
Statistical modeling identified the most influential factors and quantified response trends.
infographic.evidence_signal: The best coating reached a corrosion current density of 2.18 µA cm−2 and the models reported R² values above 0.99, indicating strong predictive fit.
infographic.watch_item: Results are specific to the tested spray conditions and electrolyte environment, so scale-up or different service environments may change the coating’s performance.
infographic.paper_title: STUDY ON THE CORROSION BEHAVIOUR OF PLASMA SPRAYED NANO Al2O3–TiO2– AISI 1020 STEEL COATINGS USING DEFINITIVE SCREENING DESIGN

zh-Hans.title: 采用确定性筛选设计研究等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2–AISI 1020 钢涂层腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究评估了等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2 涂层在 AISI 1020 低碳钢上的电化学腐蚀性能。在固定 TiO2 含量（2 wt.%）的条件下，采用确定性筛选设计（DSD）研究了 Al2O3 含量（2、3 和 4 wt.%）、NaCl 浓度、暴露时间、温度和 pH 的影响。使用 Corrtest CS350M 工作站上的动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）评估腐蚀行为。含 Al2O3（4 wt.%）+ TiO2（2 wt.%）的涂层耐腐蚀性最高，其腐蚀电流密度最低（2.18 µA cm−2），腐蚀电位（−0.489 V（vs. SCE））也最低，且与未涂层样品相比显著降低。统计分析结果表明，NaCl 浓度对腐蚀速率的影响约为 78%，且 NaCl 浓度变化对腐蚀电流密度变异的解释度为 72%。比较各涂层参数的影响后发现，Al2O3 含量的影响最为显著，该参数约解释了响应变量变异的 15% 和 21%。确定的最低腐蚀速率为 0.010 mm yr−1，所建立的模型表现出良好的预测能力，R² 值均超过 0.99。

infographic.key_insight: AISI 1020 钢上的等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2 涂层提高了耐腐蚀性，其中 4 wt.% Al2O3 + 2 wt.% TiO2 涂层表现最佳。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化陶瓷涂层组成和暴露条件可显著降低在强盐环境中使用的低碳钢构件的腐蚀。
method: 采用确定性筛选设计（DSD）改变 Al2O3 含量、NaCl 浓度、暴露时间、温度和 pH。
采用动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）测量腐蚀行为。
采用统计建模识别最具影响力的因素并量化响应趋势。
infographic.evidence_signal: 最佳涂层的腐蚀电流密度达到 2.18 µA cm−2，且模型报告的 R² 值均高于 0.99，表明具有较强的预测拟合能力。
infographic.watch_item: 结果仅适用于所测试的喷涂条件和电解质环境，因此放大应用或不同服役环境可能会改变涂层性能。

title: DEVELOPMENT AND CHARACTERIZATION OF WEAR-RESISTANT AL₂O₃-BASED COATINGS PRODUCED BY DETONATION SPRAYING
authors: Daryn Baizhan, Elzhan Birzhan, Gulim Tleubergenova
abstract: In this study, Al₂O₃-based oxide coatings were deposited on 10Kh18N9 austenitic stainless steel using the detonation spraying method, and their structural, mechanical, corrosion, and tribological properties were investigated. The effect of barrel filling levels (53%, 58%, and 63%) on coating formation was examined. Phase analysis revealed that the α-Al₂O₃ phase was predominant under all spraying conditions, accounting for 77–80% of the coating composition. The highest microhardness was achieved at a barrel filling level of 58%, with a microhardness of 1362.3 HV and an elastic modulus of 190.0 GPa. Corrosion tests demonstrated that the coatings reduced the corrosion current density by up to two times compared with the untreated steel substrate, while the highest corrosion resistance was observed at a filling level of 63% (Icorr = 0.00725 A/cm²). Tribological tests showed that the wear rate against a ZrO₂ counterbody was significantly lower than that against a 100Cr6 steel counterbody.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Detonation-sprayed Al2O3-based coatings on stainless steel achieved a strong α-Al2O3-dominant structure with improved hardness, corrosion resistance, and wear performance, with performance depending on barrel filling level.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study identifies detonation-spray settings that can be tuned to produce durable protective ceramic coatings for wear- and corrosion-critical components.
method: Deposited Al2O3-based oxide coatings on 10Kh18N9 austenitic stainless steel by detonation spraying.
Compared barrel filling levels of 53%, 58%, and 63% to study coating formation and properties.
Measured phase composition, microhardness, elastic modulus, corrosion behavior, and tribological wear against ZrO2 and 100Cr6 counterbodies.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports α-Al2O3 as the dominant phase (77–80%), peak microhardness of 1362.3 HV at 58% filling, and the best corrosion resistance at 63% filling with Icorr = 0.00725 A/cm².
infographic.watch_item: The best hardness, corrosion resistance, and wear behavior occur at different filling levels, so process optimization must balance competing property targets rather than assume one setting is universally optimal.
infographic.paper_title: DEVELOPMENT AND CHARACTERIZATION OF WEAR-RESISTANT AL₂O₃-BASED COATINGS PRODUCED BY DETONATION SPRAYING

zh-Hans.title: 通过爆炸喷涂制备耐磨 Al₂O₃ 基涂层的开发与表征
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究采用爆炸喷涂方法在 10Kh18N9 奥氏体不锈钢上沉积了 Al₂O₃ 基氧化物涂层，并研究了其结构、力学、腐蚀和摩擦学性能。考察了药筒填充率（53%、58% 和 63%）对涂层形成的影响。相分析表明，在所有喷涂条件下，α-Al₂O₃ 相均占主导地位，占涂层组成的 77–80%。当药筒填充率为 58% 时获得了最高显微硬度，显微硬度为 1362.3 HV，弹性模量为 190.0 GPa。腐蚀试验表明，与未经处理的钢基体相比，涂层可将腐蚀电流密度降低至最高约 2 倍，而最高耐腐蚀性出现在填充率为 63% 时（Icorr = 0.00725 A/cm²）。摩擦学试验显示，与 ZrO₂ 对偶体相比，涂层对 100Cr6 钢对偶体的磨损率显著更低。

infographic.key_insight: 在不锈钢上通过爆炸喷涂制备的 Al₂O₃ 基涂层形成了以 α-Al₂O₃ 为主的强结构，并在硬度、耐腐蚀性和耐磨性能方面得到提升，其性能取决于药筒填充率。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究确定了可调的爆炸喷涂参数，可用于制备适用于耐磨和耐腐蚀关键部件的耐久防护陶瓷涂层。
method: 采用爆炸喷涂法在 10Kh18N9 奥氏体不锈钢上沉积 Al₂O₃ 基氧化物涂层。
比较 53%、58% 和 63% 的药筒填充率，以研究涂层形成及其性能。
测量相组成、显微硬度、弹性模量、腐蚀行为以及与 ZrO₂ 和 100Cr6 对偶体接触时的摩擦磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告 α-Al₂O₃ 为主导相（77–80%），58% 填充率时显微硬度峰值为 1362.3 HV，63% 填充率时耐腐蚀性最佳，Icorr = 0.00725 A/cm²。
infographic.watch_item: 最佳硬度、耐腐蚀性和耐磨行为出现在不同的填充率下，因此工艺优化必须在相互竞争的性能目标之间进行权衡，而不能假定某一设置对所有性能都是最优的。
